description: Pins instance_id-required, the no-fields rejection, and the PUT body. Confirm passed so Go clears its confirm gate; the confirm-message text itself diverges (see report).

cases.name: requires at least one update field
cases.expect_error: at least one update field is required: label, group, tags, alerts, maintenance_policy, or watchdog_enabled

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a Linode instance. Set confirm=true to proceed.
